title: IShowSpeed health status: Social media icon collapsed on livestream after 12 hours of intense streaming on Caribbean tour
summary_full: Popular YouTuber and livestreamer IShowSpeed scared fans after he appeared to pass out during a live stream in St. Maarten. The incident happened during his ongoing Caribbean tour, where he has been streaming from multiple countries. A short video clip quickly went viral on social media, showing the 21-year-old looking extremely tired before collapsing while people nearby rushed to help him.
